scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @br-validators/core test:coverage && pnpm --filter @br-validators/cli test:coverage && pnpm --filter @br-validators/zod test:coverage && pnpm --filter @br-validators/react-hook-form test:coverage
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @br-validators/core build && pnpm -r --sequential typecheck && pnpm typecheck:scripts
scripts.verify: pnpm --filter @br-validators/core build && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build
scripts.fetch:data: pnpm fetch:data:ibge && pnpm fetch:data:bancos && pnpm fetch:data:aeroportos && pnpm fetch:data:tse-municipios && pnpm fetch:data:moedas && pnpm fetch:data:paises-bacen && pnpm fetch:data:incoterms && pnpm fetch:data:ddd && pnpm fetch:data:cnaes && pnpm fetch:data:cfop && pnpm fetch:data:natureza-juridica && pnpm fetch:data:nbs && pnpm fetch:data:cest && pnpm fetch:data:portos && pnpm fetch:data:pncp-reference && pnpm fetch:data:transparencia && pnpm fetch:data:ncm && pnpm fetch:data:cbo
